items.definition_en: A sofa is a long seat for several people.
items.example_en: They bought a new sofa for the living room.

items.definition_en: A table is a piece of furniture with a flat top and legs.
items.example_en: We eat dinner at the table every night.

items.definition_en: A bed is furniture for sleeping on.
items.example_en: My bed is in the corner of my room.

items.definition_en: A chair is a piece of furniture for one person to sit on.
items.example_en: She sat on the chair by the window.

items.definition_en: A lamp is a device that gives light.
items.example_en: He turned on the lamp to read.

items.definition_en: A wardrobe is a large cabinet for clothes.
items.example_en: My clothes are hanging in the wardrobe.

items.definition_en: A bookshelf is a shelf for holding books.
items.example_en: She put her favorite books on the bookshelf.

items.definition_en: A rug is a small carpet.
items.example_en: There is a soft rug next to the bed.

items.definition_en: A mirror is glass that reflects your image.
items.example_en: He looked at himself in the mirror.

items.definition_en: A pillow is a soft cushion for your head.
items.example_en: She rests her head on the pillow.

items.definition_en: A blanket is a warm cover for a bed.
items.example_en: He pulled the blanket up to his chin.

items.definition_en: A drawer is a sliding box in furniture for storage.
items.example_en: I keep my socks in the drawer.

items.definition_en: A cushion is a soft pad for a chair or sofa.
items.example_en: The blue cushion is on the sofa.

items.definition_en: Curtains are cloth used to cover windows.
items.example_en: He closed the curtains at night.

items.definition_en: A cupboard is a piece of furniture with doors for storage.
items.example_en: There are plates in the cupboard.

items.definition_en: A stool is a simple seat without a back or arms.
items.example_en: He sat on a wooden stool at the bar.

items.definition_en: A dresser is a chest of drawers for clothes.
items.example_en: She put her shirts in the dresser.

items.definition_en: A clock is a device that shows the time.
items.example_en: The clock on the wall is very old.

items.definition_en: A shelf is a flat surface for putting things on.
items.example_en: He put the keys on the shelf.

items.definition_en: An armchair is a comfortable chair with armrests.
items.example_en: Grandpa sat in his armchair to read.
